subparts.text: What are the owned and earned social media metrics? Explain with examples.
Differentiate between short tail and long tail keywords. In which situations are they preferred.
What is content audit? Why is it needed in digital marketing?
Define the concept of “tipping point”. Explain the idea with the help of a network example

questions.question_text: What is the role of Google’s Page Rank in search engine analytics? Explain the factors affecting Page Rank.
What is CRM? Discuss the key features of Hubspot CRM and it’s role in digital marketing.
Discuss the role of category keywords, brand keywords and competitor keywords in search engine optimization. Explain with examples
Discuss the importance of off-page optimization in SEO. List the factors affecting off-page optimization
Explain the process of clustering for audience analysis using an example.
How is conjoint analysis used to segment a market? Explain with examples
Explain Gladwell’s key ideas from the case when network is constructed in a way that results in non-activation of some nodes in a given network.
Evaluate the impact of service quality on e-loyalty?
